'''satate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kinemically|kinemically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-t-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kinemically|kinemically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| satate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:satate|satate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:satatesher|satatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satatesherĂ«m|satatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:satatero|satatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:satateshĂ«|satateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satateshĂ«m|satateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisatatero|gokisatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisatateshĂ«|gokisatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatateshĂ«m|gokisatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosatankerom|gosatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosatankeshĂ«|gosatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatankeshĂ«m|gosatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosatankeya|gosatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sataterom|sataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satatemu|satatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:satateya|satateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisataterom|gokisataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatatemu|gokisatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisatateya|gokisatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:satatate|satatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:satatatesher|satatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satatatesherĂ«m|satatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:satatatero|satatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:satatateshĂ«|satatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satatateshĂ«m|satatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisatatatero|gokisatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisatatateshĂ«|gokisatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatatateshĂ«m|gokisatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosatatankerom|gosatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosatatankeshĂ«|gosatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosatatankeshĂ«m|gosatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosatatankeya|gosatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:satataterom|satataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:satatatemu|satatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:satatateya|satatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisatataterom|gokisatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisatatatemu|gokisatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisatatateya|gokisatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠte|sĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠtesher|sĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|sĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠtero|sĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|sĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|sĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠtero|gokisĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokisĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokisĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gosĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gosĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosĂŠtĂŠnkeya|gosĂŠtĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠterom|sĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠtemu|sĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:sĂŠtĂŠteya|sĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠterom|gokisĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokisĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisĂŠtĂŠteya|gokisĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:saftafte|saftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:saftaftesher|saftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saftaftesherĂ«m|saftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saftaftero|saftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:saftafteshĂ«|saftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saftafteshĂ«m|saftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaftaftero|gokisaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisaftafteshĂ«|gokisaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaftafteshĂ«m|gokisaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gosaftafnkerom|gosaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosaftafnkeshĂ«|gosaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosaftafnkeshĂ«m|gosaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gosaftafnkeya|gosaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:saftafterom|saftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:saftaftemu|saftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:saftafteya|saftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokisaftafterom|gokisaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisaftaftemu|gokisaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokisaftafteya|gokisaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
